package rulecoverage

func NegativeCookieWithoutHttponly() string {
    ruleID := "cookie_without_httponly"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`http.Cookie{...}` for session/auth cookies without `HttpOnly: true`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
